item.title: The 409th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - "SOUND ON! Videos A.F." Edition # 39
item.description:
I fucking love these
STAY TUNED! I'm running out of MeeMays again and I'm going to be cutting down posting frequency for a little while. I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild EVERY OTHER Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #SoundOn #Dump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: Nanna on the news!
item.description:
Hi everyone, that's me! My 18 year old dog made the news and I couldn't wait to show you
If you've seen my posts this week then you know that we're celebrating Nanna's 18th birthday For a dog that even the veterinarians thought would die at 15, she definitely deserves an entire week of celebrations
NANNA THE WONDERDOG ＼⁠(⁠°⁠o⁠°⁠)⁠／ Not me crying at just an advertisement
So when the news wanted to do a story on her I was super excited
I didn't know they were going to talk about Mr Puckett the dog Heavy tears, can't stop
People all over the world on Imgur have been donating $18 for Nanna's 18th birthday to support domestic violence survivors at The Mary Parrish Center This year through two days of posts we're up to $3,500 and over 100 items have been sent to the center off their wishlist!
We've done a lot of incredible things together on Imgur, but this cause is the one I keep coming back to every year If the leading cause of homelessness for women and children in America is domestic violence, then supporting these families is a way to keep them off the street entirely
I thought they were just going to do a 30 second blurb and kinda mention The Mary Parrish Center I was so thrilled when the story kept going and going it was amazing My mom was pretty happy about it too -
She's always so supportive
So while I continue to shower Nanna with love and adventures for her birthday week, I want to thank everyone so much who's been contributing to domestic violence survivors facing homelessness in her name If you'd like to donate $18 for Nanna's 18th birthday or send household items directly to survivors, I'll include the links below
I like to talk about the positive things, but that first year with Nanna was one of the most difficult things I've ever done. It's not often that you get to see the benefits of hard work so vividly, but as I sit here 2 and half years later with a dog who does 10ks, cuddles close and is as healthy as can be I can't help but think I'm the luckiest guy in the world. I love you so much Nanna Pants, happy birthday beautiful. ... To donate $18 to abuse survivors in honor of Nanna's 18th birthday - https://www.maryparrish.org/donate ... If you'd like to send supplies to the survivors of domestic violence at Mary Parrish - https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/3USHUHIVSINQE?ref_=wl_share ... Thank you all so much for reading my post
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.title: Not actually my 15th, but close enough.
item.description: Stu, let me ask you a question: how did you not realize until then that you had too many eggs? Nobody sells eggs in a big cloth-covered basket, so you must have done that yourself. That means you spent god-knows-how-long opening up twelve whole cartons of eggs, carefully placing each egg one-by-one inside a big basket, and then covering it with a big picnic cloth… and at no point- at no point- did you ever stop and think “gee, there might be TOO MANY FUCKING EGGS HERE” You really have lost control of your life. - Copied from @VRGS
item.dc:creator: alltheLalz

item.title: Does a bear dump acorns in the woods? - 081
item.description: Bear fact #187: Acorns are known to penetrate Level III ballistic vests and are banned in most countries. 080 - https://imgur.com/gallery/kjM2QTD 079 - https://imgur.com/gallery/EVhBE90 078 - item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Can I offer you a meme in these trying times?
item.description:
Is it Friday yet?
This one kills me every time. I will not be deleting it after this dump.
I’m obsessed with stupid looking bird things. They make me very happy.
…I’m getting better.
Mr. and Mrs. Dursley of number four, Privet Drive, were proud to say that they were perfectly normal, thank you very much. And then the murders began.
My class this year has changed my stance on stupid questions. They do in fact exist, and the one I’m sick of this year is when a student holds up a piece of trash and asks, “what do I do with this?”
One of my favorite pastimes is whistling like a chickadee and watching them freak the heck out trying to figure out where the interloper is.
Can confirm.
Story time. Literally every time my husband and I start a house project, there’s a guarantee that it will spiral into at least 6 other projects accompanied by at least a hundred “wtf is this? WHY WOULD ANYONE DO THIS?” Most recently was replacing the light in my office and discovering that there was no junction box in the ceiling for the light wiring. Also discovering that the outlet our washer and dryer are plugged into has been sparking inside the wall for two years and we didn’t know. It’s fixed now thankfully, but ya know. At least the house didn’t burn down.
Spoiler alert, it’s me.
Winnie tax
item.dc:creator: rjmmbc

item.description: Which came first the Chicken or the Embryo?

item.title: Picture of the funeral of Zanjeer the police dog who saved thousands of life
item.description: Zanjeer the dog saved thousands of lives during Mumbai serial blasts in March 1993 by detecting more than 3,329 kgs of the explosive RDX, 600 detonators, 249 hand grenades and 6406 rounds of live ammunition. He was buried with full honors in 2000
item.dc:creator: CookieMonster312

item.title: Bet they were impossible to clean
item.dc:creator: PineappleIsDeliciousOnPizzaFightMe

item.title: Potentially World Changing
item.description: ... and so far it's back page news Every article I tried to find is behind a paywall The crux of it: "Iowa State University scientists have made a DNA discovery that can express its own genetic instructions. The research began over a decade ago, and scientists used decades-old DNA discoveries to lead their findings. The discovery allows scientists to change DNA materials to convey their own genetic instructions made by a scientist inside the body. This research can be applied toward advancements in medical treatments. ISU professor Eric Henderson has been working on creating microscopic DNA particles. He used an atomic microscope to build the DNA structures." https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KtQCVh3aOQ4&ab_channel=WeAreIowaLocal5News
item.dc:creator: MightyUrto

item.title: 15 from my 15th six years ago. Thanks for saving my sanity!
item.description:
Mine is the left one. How about yours?
Cause I will be nearby secretly recording you. ?
Truth.
Consequences? For me? Nonsense!
I once had a wiper blade break off in a heavy storm. I felt like my windscreen suddenly needed glasses.
Good sex, and good pancakes. None of that two-minute quickie and shaker-bottle instant pancake mix. Take your time, make it delicious.
Again, it's my left one. It refuses to be caged.
Lots of pillows are key.
I would buy them by the dozen like a kid searching for a favourite toy.
?
I've almost lost all hope. I need wierdos to commune with.
My face atm.
I got more lore than Tolkien.
Take a big bite out of life before it takes a bite out of you!
Cat Tax #1 Patches
Cat Tax #2 Holly
Cat Tax #3 Velcro
item.dc:creator: FoolishDoughnut

item.title: I like my job but no one calls me for a good time
item.description: I feel bad. Not a lot of ways to make it easier except I skip or couch what I can. Edit: Thank you all for your kind words, humor and advice.
item.dc:creator: Hugh4U
